description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Using the website's support contact form, submit a high-priority billing request about being charged twice the same amount for a single recent order, selecting the billing/payments category, choosing email as the contact method, and clearly mentioning the order details and both identical charges in the message.

expected_values.subject: Charged twice for order #45821 on February 10, 2025
description_must_contain: two charges of $49.99 for the same order

tasks.instruction: Using the support contact form, submit a technical support request about the mobile app crashing on Android 13 when opening notifications, selecting the technical-support category, specifying Android as the platform, describing at least three numbered steps to reproduce including the OS version, setting a middle priority, and choosing whichever contact option advertises the fastest response time while still providing your email and phone number.

expected_values.subject: App crashes on Android 13 when opening notifications

tasks.instruction: Through the support contact form, submit low-priority general feedback about the website’s new dark mode design, choosing a feedback category, writing at least two sentences that mention both dark mode and the navigation menu, indicating that no response is needed, leaving any marketing or newsletter options unselected, and providing your email address.

target_names: Feedback on new dark mode and navigation menu

expected_values.subject: Feedback on new dark mode and navigation menu

tasks.instruction: Using the privacy or account section of the support contact form, request permanent deletion of your account and personal data as an EU (Germany) user by selecting the account/privacy category, choosing the account deletion/data removal reason, indicating Germany as your country, setting the highest priority, referencing EU data protection laws in the message, and choosing email for follow-up.

expected_values.subject: Request to delete my account and all personal data

tasks.instruction: From the support contact form, request a shipping address change for your most recent order by selecting the orders/shipping category, choosing the latest order in the list, including clearly labeled old and new addresses in the description, setting a medium priority, and selecting phone as your preferred contact method while also entering your phone number and email.

target_names: Phone – response within 4 hours during business hours
Old address: 1458 Oakridge Avenue, Apt 3B, Denver, CO 80203, United States
New address: 720 Market Street, Suite 1200, San Francisco, CA 94103, United States

expected_values.subject: Request to change shipping address for my recent order

tasks.name: From the support contact form, request a shipping address change for your most recent order by selecting the orders/shipping category, choosing the latest order in the list, including clearly labeled old and new addresses in the description, setting a medium priority, and selecting phone as your preferred contact method while also entering your phone number and email.

tasks.instruction: Using the support contact form, escalate an unresolved existing support ticket by selecting the existing-request follow-up/escalation category, entering the original ticket ID in the appropriate field and subject, clearly stating that the issue remains unresolved and asking for a supervisor review, setting the highest priority, opting to attach the previous conversation if possible, and choosing email as the contact method.

expected_values.subject: Escalation request for unresolved ticket SR-483920

tasks.name: Using the support contact form, escalate an unresolved existing support ticket by selecting the existing-request follow-up/escalation category, entering the original ticket ID in the appropriate field and subject, clearly stating that the issue remains unresolved and asking for a supervisor review, setting the highest priority, opting to attach the previous conversation if possible, and choosing email as the contact method.

tasks.instruction: Via the support contact form, report a web app bug where items added to favorites do not stay saved in Chrome on Windows, selecting the bug report or technical support category, specifying the web app platform with the relevant OS and browser version, listing at least three explicit steps to reproduce, ending the description with an 'Expected vs Actual' line, setting a medium priority, choosing email as the contact method, and leaving any diagnostic-log sharing option turned off.

target_names: Favorites not saving in web app on Chrome 120 (Windows 11)

expected_values.subject: Favorites not saving in web app on Chrome 120 (Windows 11)
description_must_contain: Log into the web app on Windows 11.
click the star icon to add it to favorites
Expected: favorites remain saved after refresh. Actual: favorites disappear after refresh.

tasks.name: Via the support contact form, report a web app bug where items added to favorites do not stay saved in Chrome on Windows, selecting the bug report or technical support category, specifying the web app platform with the relevant OS and browser version, listing at least three explicit steps to reproduce, ending the description with an 'Expected vs Actual' line, setting a medium priority, choosing email as the contact method, and leaving any diagnostic-log sharing option turned off.

tasks.instruction: Using the billing section of the support contact form, request a detailed PDF invoice copy for a past business purchase by selecting the billing/payments category and the invoice-copy reason, marking the account as business, including the purchase amount, purchase date, and your VAT ID in the message, setting a low priority, and choosing email as the preferred contact method.

target_names: Invoice copy request for business purchase on 2025-03-05

expected_values.subject: Invoice copy request for $79.99 purchase on March 5, 2025

tasks.name: Using the billing section of the support contact form, request a detailed PDF invoice copy for a past business purchase by selecting the billing/payments category and the invoice-copy reason, marking the account as business, including the purchase amount, purchase date, and your VAT ID in the message, setting a low priority, and choosing email as the preferred contact method.

tasks.instruction: From the sales or onboarding contact form, schedule an onboarding call for a team of 12 by selecting the sales/onboarding category, entering the team size, choosing the earliest available date within the next 7 days, picking the earliest time slot between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM in the US/Eastern time zone, briefly describing the onboarding request, and selecting email as the preferred contact method.

expected_values.subject: Onboarding call request for team of 12
